system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'
user:
CUSTOMER LANGUAGE: en
CUSTOMER EMAIL: metrology.purchasing@tesserasemiconductor.com.tw
ORIGINAL SUBJECT: Reschedule shipment SO-TSMC-FAB-308-2503 → 2026-05-28
DETECTED INTENT: delivery_change
ACTION: reschedule_order
EXECUTION RESULT: {'status': 'awaiting_one_click', 'action': 'reschedule_order', 'preview': {'action': 'reschedule_order', 'customer_id': 3, 'extracted': {'order_number': 'SO-TSMC-FAB-308-2503', 'current_ship_date': None, 'new_ship_date': '2026-05-28', 'direction': 'push_out', 'reason': "Anechoic chamber installation has slipped and they won't be ready to receive the instruments before then.", '_intent': 'delivery_change'}}}
EXTRACTED FIELDS: {'order_number': 'SO-TSMC-FAB-308-2503', 'current_ship_date': None, 'new_ship_date': '2026-05-28', 'direction': 'push_out', 'reason': "Anechoic chamber installation has slipped and they won't be ready to receive the instruments before then.", '_intent': 'delivery_change'}

Draft a courteous, accurate reply. JSON only.

Respond with a single JSON object only. No code fences. No prose before or after.
raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: Reschedule shipment SO-TSMC-FAB-308-2503 → 2026-05-28", "body": "Dear Tessera Semiconductor Procurement Team,

Thank you for letting us know about the anechoic chamber installation timing and for the advance notice.

We have received your request to reschedule shipment of order SO-TSMC-FAB-308-2503 to 2026-05-28. The reschedule is currently pending final confirmation on our side, and we will follow up with a written confirmation as soon as the new ship date is locked in our system.

If there is any further change to your site readiness in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out so we can keep the schedule aligned with your needs.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps"}

parsed.subject: Re: Reschedule shipment SO-TSMC-FAB-308-2503 → 2026-05-28
parsed.body:
Dear Tessera Semiconductor Procurement Team,

Thank you for letting us know about the anechoic chamber installation timing and for the advance notice.

We have received your request to reschedule shipment of order SO-TSMC-FAB-308-2503 to 2026-05-28. The reschedule is currently pending final confirmation on our side, and we will follow up with a written confirmation as soon as the new ship date is locked in our system.

If there is any further change to your site readiness in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out so we can keep the schedule aligned with your needs.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
